user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of learning programs with title, program type, description and status, so that I can manage the training catalog.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Learning Program screen; When the page loads; Then a list displays title, program type, description and status for each program

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter learning programs by program type, so that I can find programs of a particular category.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Learning Program screen; When I select a program type and search; Then only programs of that type are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter learning programs by status such as Pending with me, Pending approval, Approved, Scheduled, Rejected, Published, Completed and Active, so that I can track programs at each lifecycle stage.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Learning Program screen; When I select a status and search; Then only programs in that status are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new learning program, so that I can make new training available to employees.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Learning Program screen; When I click Add learning program and provide the program details; Then the new program is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset filters and refresh the list, so that I can restore the default view and see current data.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Learning Program screen; When I click Reset or Refresh; Then filters are cleared and the list reloads with current data
